items.title: Markets rally amid hopes of US-Iran deal
items.summary: Markets betting a deal will reopen the Strait of Hormuz and soothe the deep global economic uncertainty.

items.title: Former assistant to TV star Matthew Perry sentenced to 41 months in prison
items.summary: Sentencing of Kenneth Iwamasa concludes prosecution of five people in connection with Perry's death from drug ketamine.

items.title: Why is Israel ramping up attacks in Lebanon despite a ceasefire?
items.summary: Intensification comes while US-Iran indirect talks continue.

items.title: Trump says no one will control Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Donald Trump says he won’t allow Iran to control ⁠the Strait of ⁠Hormuz under the terms of any deal reached with Tehran.

items.title: Ghana welcomes first group fleeing South African anti-immigration protests
items.summary: The repatriation came following a wave of anti-immigration protests in recent weeks.

items.title: Izrael proglasio južni Libanon "borbenom zonom"
items.summary: IZRAELSKA vojska proglasila je večeras velike dijelove južnog Libanona "borbenom zonom" i pozvala stanovništvo na evakuaciju.

items.title: Macron gradi europski nuklearni štit, pridružila mu se Norveška
items.summary: NORVEŠKA je pristala pridružiti se francuskom proširenom nuklearnom odvraćanju, rekao je francuski predsjednik Emmanuel Macron nakon susreta s norveškim premijerom Jonasom Gahrom Støreom u Parizu.

items.title: Alabama pushes US Supreme Court to approve congressional map for midterms
items.summary: Republicans have revived a push to implement a congressional map that was rejected in 2023 for racial discrimination.

items.title: Trump appears to threaten Oman over Strait of Hormuz impasse
items.summary: The US president warns that Oman, a US ally, 'will behave just like everybody else, or we will have to blow them up'.

items.title: Israel issues evacuation order for swathes of southern Lebanon
items.summary: The military says areas south of the Zahrani River are now "combat zones" as it threatens Hezbollah with fresh strikes.

items.title: Can the US and India repair ties over trade and China?
items.summary: Rubio's visit to India comes as Washington seeks closer ties with New Delhi amid trade tensions and energy politics.

items.title: Israel orders evacuation of the Lebanese city of Tyre amid bombardment
items.summary: Israel has ordered the evacuation of the southern Lebanese city of Tyre

items.title: Florida’s ‘Alligator Alcatraz’ migrant detention centre to close
items.summary: The US is set to shut down the federal migrant detention centre known as ‘Alligator Alcatraz’.

items.title: Raid on Indian opposition leader triggers violence in Kerala
items.summary: Raid on Indian opposition leader triggers violence in Kerala

items.title: India orders demolition drive along border as Pakistan tensions simmer
items.summary: The interior minister urged officials to address infiltration, narcotics, smuggling, and other 'trans-border crimes'.

items.title: Osuđen asistent Matthewa Perryja koji mu je davao ketamin prije smrti
items.summary: OSOBNI asistent Matthewa Perryja, Kenneth Iwamasa, osuđen je na 41 mjesec zatvora zbog uloge u nabavi ketamina koji je uzrokovao glumčevu smrt. Priznao je krivnju za udruživanje radi distribucije.

items.title: Britanski obavještajci: U Ukrajini je poginulo gotovo pola milijuna Rusa
items.summary: ŠEFICA britanske agencije GCHQ objavila je novu procjenu prema kojoj je u Ukrajini od početka invazije poginulo gotovo pola milijuna ruskih vojnika, što je znatno više od prethodnih procjena.

items.title: Russia to task bankers with shooting down Ukrainian drones
items.summary: New legislation aims to integrate banks into Russia's air defences using jamming systems and trained employees.

items.title: Meloni okrenula leđa Trumpu i Netanyahuu? Talijani pričaju o velikom zaokretu
items.summary: ANALIZA potencijalnog zaokreta u vanjskoj politici Italije pod Giorgiom Meloni. Rastu napetosti s povijesnim saveznicima, SAD-om i Izraelom, nakon incidenata vezanih uz Trumpa i Netanyahuovu vladu.

items.title: Zašto Putinov Orešnik radi iznenađujuće malu štetu u Ukrajini?
items.summary: RUSKI hipersonični projektil Orešnik, unatoč Putinovoj propagandi, pokazao se kao skupi promašaj. Zbog tehničkih ograničenja i lažnog streljiva, nanosi minimalnu štetu u Ukrajini.
